prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8710→9829→11134→14586→13804，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约2670名；2025年基准约13804名，较2024年小幅回升约782名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为44→45→43→43→41人，2025年41人；2026年计划37人，较2025年减少4人（缩招约9.8%），招生名额缩减对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第66名，近年排名稳定在65–76区间，属全国知名财经强校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第92位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光量中等；近年无投档断档记录，录取走势平稳；应用经济学A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理A、统计学A-，共3个A-及以上学科；金融学类、会计学、财政学类、统计学类等招生专业直接对应王牌学科，学科实力对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类相关专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐；金融/财经/经济类2024年评估为分化观望，较2023年小幅升温；本省物理类考生2026年约347000人，较2025年320192人增加约8.4%，竞争略有加剧；西南财经大学位于四川成都，属西南地区，在湖南省无显著地域偏好优势；该校在湖南招生规模较小（物理类37人），跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13804名、2026年物理类计划缩招9.8%、本省物理类考生增加约8.4%以及声誉/热度平稳等因素，预计2026年最低位次约13016名，较2025年有所前移（竞争略缓解），区间12516–13516名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12516–13516名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（金融学联合学位、会计学双语班、数字经济拔尖班等）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<12516名）可重点冲击一档；位次接近区间上限（>13516名）应以三档稳妥专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8710 → 9829 → 11134 → 14586 → 13804, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2670 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 13804, a slight rebound of about 782 places from 2024; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 44 → 45 → 43 → 43 → 41, with 41 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 37, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 9.8%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable range of 65–76 in recent years, a nationally renowned strong finance and economics institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (average evaluation), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no recent enrollment gaps, with stable admission trends; Applied Economics is A+ (top nationally), Business Administration is A, Statistics is A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines; enrollment majors such as Finance, Accounting, Public Finance, and Statistics directly correspond to top disciplines, with sustained appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other Physics-related majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; Finance/Economics majors were assessed as divergent and wait-and-see in 2024, with a slight warming compared to 2023; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region, with no significant regional preference advantage in Hunan; the university's enrollment scale in Hunan is small (37 in Physics Category), with a stable cross-provincial competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13804, the 9.8% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the approximately 8.4% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, and stable reputation/popularity, the 2026 minimum ranking is predicted to be about 13016, a slight forward shift from 2025 (competition slightly eased), with a range of 12516–13516.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12516–13516, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 top majors (Finance joint degree, Accounting bilingual class, Digital Economy top-notch class, etc.) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<12516), focus on Tier 1; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>13516), prioritize safe Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1606 → 1901 → 1755 → 1868 → 1832, fluctuating narrowly within the 1600–1900 range, with a fluctuation amplitude of about 150 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1832; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 26 → 25 → 23 → 27 → 15 students, with a significant reduction to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15 students, unchanged from 2025, with no additional expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, and is a nationally renowned strong finance and economics institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (average evaluation), with moderate exposure; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years, with a stable admission trend; Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, Statistics is A-; among the History Category enrollment majors, Finance, Fiscal Studies, Accounting, and Business Administration directly correspond to the university's top disciplines, with disciplinary strength providing continuous appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Economics/Economic majors were assessed as differentiated and wait-and-see in 2024, with a slight warming compared to 2023; Law majors were differentiated and wait-and-see in 2024, while Accounting/Auditing/Finance majors are recommended; the number of provincial History Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31% from 142,547 in 2025, leading to notably intensified competition; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, with no significant regional preference advantage in Hunan Province; the university's enrollment scale in Hunan for History Category is very small (15 students), with a stable cross-provincial competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1832, the unchanged 2026 History Category plan, the significant increase of about 31% in provincial History Category candidates (notably intensified competition), and stable reputation/popularity, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to be approximately 1862, slightly lower than 2025 (slightly intensified competition), with a range of 1527–2197.
